title: Stir-Fried Broccoli with Garlic and Ginger
description: A quick and easy Chinese-inspired stir-fry recipe that combines the flavors of garlic, ginger, and broccoli.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add 2 cloves of minced garlic and 1 tablespoon of grated ginger. Cook for 1-2 minutes until fragrant.
Add 1 cup of broccoli florets and cook for 2-3 minutes until tender.
Season with soy sauce and stir-fry for another minute.
Serve hot over rice or noodles.
Optional: Thread broccoli and garlic onto skewers for a fun and easy appetizer.
